station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Strategic Learners - High engagement + good writing) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
No critical writing issue detected right now. Focus on enrichment and consistency in future tasks.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
help_seeking_examples: Hello miss i hope ur doing well Anfel told me that u said that everyone who didn’t come today will take a 0 as a test mark I wanted to apologize first and clarify that i have been working all day long that’s why i didn’t come i hope u that u’ll change ur mind and take a more flexible decision considering my situation I hope u’ll be understandable and thank u 🙏

The difficulties i faced during writing the second argumentative paragraph are collecting evidence and examples to support my evidence and away from that i faced difficulties not getting out of structure and so writing the small conclusions for the paragraph even though i managed to write one i hope it will be satisfying

Hello miss i hope ur doing well Anfel told me that u said that everyone who didn’t come today will take a 0 as a test mark I wanted to apologize first and clarify that i have been working all day long that’s why i didn’t come i hope u that u’ll change ur mind and take a more flexible decision considering my situation I hope u’ll be understandable and thank u 🙏
